title: coryphopteris subbipinnata
intro: Coryphopteris subbipinnata, also known as the 'Tropical Maidenhair', is a type of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Coryphopteris subbipinnata include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
